CrewOrdersStep1.title: Crew orders
CrewOrdersStep1.description:
We need to give the crew more work to do.

We can do this by setting designations with the various orders within the [color=PURPLE]Orders[/color] menu.

First, open the [color=PURPLE]Orders[/color] menu by clicking the highlighted [color=PURPLE]Orders[/color] button.

CrewOrdersStep2.description:
[color=KHAKI]Ship Debris[/color] can be deconstructed for salvaged raw materials. In order for your crew to move to and deconstruct any [color=KHAKI]Ship Debris[/color], you need to designate it for deconstruction.

We can do that with the [color=PURPLE]Deconstruct[/color] order button.

CrewOrdersStep3.description:
Now [color=LIGHT_GREEN]click and drag[/color] using the {select} over the [color=KHAKI]Ship Debris[/color] to designate this for deconstruction.

Designate at least 2 pieces of [color=KHAKI]Ship Debris[/color] to be deconstructed.

You may need to zoom out and move the camera around to find some.

CrewOrdersStep4.description:
Now we will do the same for [color=KHAKI]Asteroids[/color]. You can find multiple different types throughout the Slog and they can be visually identified by their different coloured ore highlights.

This time we will select the [color=PURPLE]Mining[/color] order button in the [color=PURPLE]Orders[/color] menu.

CrewOrdersStep5.description:
[color=KHAKI]Asteroids[/color] will also need to be designated for mining.

Go ahead and [color=LIGHT_GREEN]click and drag[/color] using the {select} over at least 2 [color=KHAKI]Asteroids[/color] and your crew will start mining them when available.
